creator: oleg@ogurok.com
text:
Can't make mutt port. I think there is something wrong with installing
dependent packages.

===>  Building for mutt-1.0b2
make  all-recursive
Making all in doc
make html
sgmlfmt -f html manual
Warning: the label `edit_headers' is multiply-defined.
make manual.txt
sgml2txt -c latin manual
sgml2txt:No such file or directory
*** Error code 1

Stop.
*** Error code 1 (ignored)
make manual.latin1
